case_title: KYLE M STERNBERG VS. DUNCAN MADDUX

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$200.00) SERVED JUL-08-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MADDUX, DUNCAN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-07-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-07-2016 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MICHAEL MAU. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF KYLE M. STENBERG. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT DUNCAN MADDUX. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. PLAINTIFF SIGNED THE STIPULATION FOR PRO TEM JUDGE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHAEL MAU. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-07-2016 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION RE: CORRECTED ADDRESS OF PLAINTIFF FILED BY PLAINTIFF STERNBERG, KYLE M

BENCH LETTER ISSUED FOR MAY-22-2017; JUDGMENT DEBTOR DUNCAN MADDUX FAILED TO APPEAR. WARRANT OF ATTACHMENT ORDERED ISSUED. BAIL SET AT 500.00. JUDGMENT CREDITOR KYLE STERNBERG IS PRESENT. JUDGMENT DEBTOR DUNCAN MADDUX IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: ORDER OF EXAMINATION BENCH LETTER (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,000.00 FILED BY STERNBERG, KYLE M AS TO DEFENDANT MADDUX, DUNCAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-07-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: FEB-07-2017 FEE FOR SERVICE: $40.00 AS TO DEFENDANT MADDUX, DUNCAN

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF MAR-13-2017 IS CONTINUED TO APR-13-2017 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 BENCH LETTER ISSUED. JUDGMENT CREDITOR KYLE STERNBERG IS PRESENT. JUDGMENT DEBTOR DUNCAN MADDUX IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: ORDER OF EXAMINATION BENCH WARRANT ISSUED (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
SIGNED AND SEALED (ORIGINAL) BENCH WARRANT OF ATTACHMENT ORDER WITH ONE COPY FORWARDED TO SHERIFF'S DEPT. AS TO DEFENDANT MADDUX, DUNCAN
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE A PRO TEM JUDGE FILED BY STERNBERG, KYLE M
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT MADDUX, DUNCAN HEARING SET FOR MAR-13-2017 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: ORDER OF EXAMINATION BENCH LETTER REISSUED (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STERNBERG, KYLE M RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MADDUX, DUNCAN $8,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $275.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,275.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
ORDER RE: ORDER OF EXAMINATION. OFF CALENDAR. NO APPEARANCES (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF APR-13-2017 IS OFF CALENDAR - NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR REISSUANCE OF BENCH LETTER TO CORRECT CLERICAL ERROR HEARING SET FOR MAY-22-2017 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
WARRANT OF ATTACHMENT ISSUED, BAIL SET AT $500.00, WARRANT FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW AND SIGNATURE AS TO DEFENDANT MADDUX, DUNCAN
